title: dendrobium subclausum var. subclausum
intro: Dendrobium subclausum var. subclausum is a rare and endangered orchid species native to China, also known as the "Fairy's Finger," which is a type of terrestrial orchid. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Dendrobium subclausum var. subclausum include the potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system, as well as its use in treating various respiratory and digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Dendrobium subclausum var. subclausum include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are typically taken in small amounts to avoid any potential side effects.
